sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68715" key="monoxordi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-χορδίζω</orth>, <sense id="n68715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measure intervals by means of the monochord</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pythag.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:3:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
